subcodes.first_line: O Maidservant of Bahá! This title is the glory of all titles and the essence of every bounty. Praise be to God that in accordance with this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه البهاء این عنوان فخر هر عنوانیست و جوهر هر الطافی الحمد لله بمقتضای این
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
